name: Beacon Hill Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the prepared horseradish and lemon juice with the cream cheese.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of clam juice from the can to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
3. Add drained clams to the mixture. If needed, add additional clam juice to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Serve with chips.
